title: Fix Connect Bot Wizard Ed25519 keypair generation (@noble/ed25519)

requirements.summary: Replace Web Crypto Ed25519 keypair generation with @noble/ed25519 in Connect Bot Wizard while preserving all existing wizard behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: In `ConnectBotWizardModal.tsx`, `handleGenerateKeypair` does not call `window.crypto.subtle.generateKey` (or any Web Crypto Ed25519 generation) on the normal path.

On the normal path, `privateKey` is generated with `ed.utils.randomPrivateKey()` and `publicKey` is derived using `await ed.getPublicKeyAsync(privateKey)` (public key is not independent random bytes).

The private key displayed and copied is a hex string derived from the generated private key (BOT_PRIVATE_KEY), and the public key remains a `Uint8Array` used by the existing `linkMutation.mutateAsync(keypair.publicKey)` flow.

If noble is unavailable, the code falls back to a 32-byte random seed and produces a placeholder derived public key, and the source includes the exact comment `// TODO: Replace with real Ed25519 derivation in production.`.

The modal’s step flow remains unchanged (generate → reveal → link → url → done), and the warning text remains exactly: `Paste this into your Python Bot's .env file as BOT_PRIVATE_KEY. This will not be shown again.`
The private key input remains blurred by default and copyable, and sensitive data is still cleared on close as currently implemented.
No new console errors are introduced when generating keys, linking the public key, or saving the bot URL.

file_operations.description: Update `handleGenerateKeypair` to generate Ed25519 keys using `@noble/ed25519` exactly as specified (`import * as ed from '@noble/ed25519'; const privateKey = ed.utils.randomPrivateKey(); const publicKey = await ed.getPublicKeyAsync(privateKey);`). Display BOT_PRIVATE_KEY as a hex string derived from `privateKey` (while keeping `publicKey` as `Uint8Array` for the existing `linkMutation.mutateAsync(keypair.publicKey)` flow). Implement a runtime/build-time fallback when noble is unavailable: generate a 32-byte random seed and create a placeholder derived public key, and include the exact comment `// TODO: Replace with real Ed25519 derivation in production.`. Preserve all existing wizard steps, blur/copy behavior, warning text, and close-clearing behavior; avoid introducing new console errors.
